latex:
The figure below, made up of rectangles, represents a room in a house. Wyatt wants to put in new baseboard all along the edges. (Baseboard is the board that runs along the bottom of a wall.) Assuming there are no doors, how much baseboard will he need? Note: All units are in terms of feet.

[DIAGRAM]

The figure shows an L-shaped room with dimensions: top section is $13$ ft wide and $3$ ft tall. Below that, there's a $5$ ft section, then a $3$ ft by $5$ ft notch. The right side shows $10$ ft. The bottom section is $13$ ft wide and $4$ ft tall.
